events.title: MAGDALENA — A Night with Mary Magdalene
events.description: An annual ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple honouring Mary Magdalene's feast day (July 22). Ancient mysticism meets modern ritual through music, sacred story, and devotional dance. Blue Lotus tea served in ceremony. Performers: Amia Rosa (Feminine Healer, Magdalene Priestess & Channel), Gigi Courau (vocals, harp, harmonium), and Zhenya Topov (celestial handpan, percussion, crystal bowls). The Dragon Tea Temple's candlelit ceremonial garden in Sayan provides the setting for this once-a-year gathering.
events.short_description: Annual Mary Magdalene feast day ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple — Blue Lotus tea, sacred story, devotional dance, harp, and handpan.

events.title: Full Moon Ceremony: West African Tribal Dance & Live Music
events.description: A full moon ceremonial gathering at The Yoga Barn featuring West African tribal dance with live djembe, kora, and kalimba. The evening opens with arrival and tea at 6 PM, moves into a participatory West African dance session with live instrumentation at 6:30 PM, then transitions to a dinner buffet and fire sharing circle from 8 PM. The event closes at 9:30 PM. Ticket price includes an unlimited hot and raw dinner buffet.
events.short_description: West African tribal dance with live drums, fire sharing circle, and buffet dinner under the July full moon at The Yoga Barn.
events.price_info: IDR 350,000 presale / IDR 450,000 door (includes unlimited hot & raw dinner buffet)

events.title: Dissolve :: Eros — Weekly Contact Dance & Conscious Movement
events.description: A weekly Tuesday evening container for contact improvisation, intuitive movement, and authentic relating at Paradiso Ubud. Running since 2019 and drawing 60–80 participants each session, Dissolve :: Eros creates an open, facilitated floor for somatic exploration and presence-based connection — no choreography, no agenda. Distinct from the Tuesday afternoon Moving Waves 5Rhythms class at the same venue (different time, different format, different lineage).
events.short_description: Weekly facilitated contact improvisation and conscious movement at Paradiso. Running since 2019. Tuesdays 6–8 PM.

events.title: Saturday Ecstatic Dance & Cacao Ceremony — Akasha New Earth Haven
events.description: Weekly Saturday evening gathering at Akasha New Earth Haven, an eco-dome and bamboo pavilion retreat at the edge of Ubud's jungle, with organic gardens and a natural swimming pool. The programme opens with a Vital Cacao Ceremony by the fire, flows into an ecstatic dance journey led by Karunika, and closes with sound healing. SuperMoon editions (held on or near full moon Saturdays) include extended breathwork and expanded programming. On-site vegan restaurant. 6–10 PM.
events.short_description: Weekly cacao ceremony, ecstatic dance, and sound healing in a jungle-edge eco-dome venue. Saturdays 6–10 PM, Ubud.
